ieee_cis.decision_rule: replace only if the 95% CI lower bound of delta PR-AUC > 0 on the paired held-out test bootstrap

replacement.model: full-data HGB (6.79M-login test, no IP feed)

rba.decision_rule: the committed sample scores did not reproduce from code; the full-data stream is reproducible AND improved the held-out numbers

paysim.full_features: ROC and PR-AUC at separability ceiling (1.000); reported as upper bound, behaviour-only is the realistic arm

leak_robustness.interpretation: PaySim full features remain near-ceiling after dropping the single most important column, i.e. separability is broad, not one leaked column.

cmu_keystroke.decision_rule: scaled-Manhattan has lower mean EER and is the published anchor

cert.decision_rule: production has no insider labels at train time; the supervised number is context only
